originalTitle: The PlayStation replica ornament is an homage to a great, yet fragile console
summary: You probably know the signature PlayStation boot sound. Did you know that it's technically a multi-part chime? There's the synthy section where "Sony Computer Entertainment" shows onscreen with a white background. You only get to the next screen with the echo-y chimes and the color-filled PlayStation logo if your console recognizes the disc. How badly […]
content: You probably know the signature PlayStation boot sound. Did you know that it’s technically a multi-part chime? There’s the synthy section where “Sony Computer Entertainment” shows onscreen with a white background. You only get to the next screen with the echo-y chimes and the color-filled PlayStation logo if your console recognizes the disc. How badly I wanted my sorta-broken console to get to that second screen. My console’s disc spindle came apart pretty early into me owning it. As an eight-year-old kid, fixing the spindle was the riskiest undertaking of my life yet. The internet wasn’t really a haven for how-tos yet, so I superglued that thing, and it worked, sort of. But the spindle is supposed to be flexible to let the disc on and off (it had a rubber ring with small ball bearings in there, too — the mechanisms were blowing my mind at the time). So, pieces came off regularly, and I would just glue them back on and keep gaming. [Image: The “Power” button is a little crooked, but small cosmetic issues like these are tough to notice from a distance. https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/poweron2.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] The wait for the second part of the boot chime to activate on my console was agonizing. It would sometimes take close to 10 seconds, or not happen at all. The upside is that it my gaming time more precious, and it made Hallmark’s new Keepsake ornament of the console hit harder than I expected it to. The company’s running series of console replicas is great, and its previous one was the Xbox 360 replica last year. It’s cool to see one made for a console with an even bigger legacy (one that’s not tainted by a widespread hardware issue). The PlayStation changed my relationship with gaming, as well as my relationship with tech. [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/memorycard.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/rearIO.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] The ornament celebrates the pre-DualShock version of the console. There are a lot of lovely details, like the ridged sides, the power plug, and the A/V port that Sony stuck with through the PlayStation 3. The controller is glued to the disc lid of the console, and its flexible cable is partially glued to its side. Upon pressing the power button, a green LED lights up, and the PlayStation chime plays in full — both parts. There are a few little imperfections that I noticed on my unit out of the box, and the power button’s font is a little crooked, but nothing that’s easy to notice at a couple feet away. $28.99 for the ornament will either seem a bit steep, or totally acceptable, depending on how nostalgia-addled you are for this era of gaming. I’ve always been the kind of gamer who likes what I like without having to be loud about it. The ornament, like Hallmark’s other Keepsake models, is elegant and not too flashy. It’s just a PlayStation that can chill in a tree come time for the holidays. It’s also a fun memento that represents a great console that I played to pieces that I can display whenever and wherever I want. [Product: Hallmark Keepsakes - PlayStation | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0G3THX7H7?tag=theverge02-20, https://www.hallmark.com/ornaments/keepsake-ornaments/playstation-console-ornament-with-light-and-sound-5QXI1136.html]
chineseTitle: PlayStation 复制品装饰品是对伟大但脆弱的游戏机的致敬
chineseSummary: 您可能知道 PlayStation 标志性的启动声音。您知道它在技术上是一个多部分的铃声吗？在合成器部分，“Sony Computer Entertainment”以白色背景显示在屏幕上。如果您的主机能够识别该光盘，您只会进入下一个带有回声铃声和彩色 PlayStation 徽标的屏幕。多么糟糕[…]
chineseContent: 您可能知道 PlayStation 标志性的启动声音。您知道它在技术上是一个多部分的铃声吗？在合成器部分，“Sony Computer Entertainment”以白色背景显示在屏幕上。如果您的主机能够识别该光盘，您只会进入下一个带有回声铃声和彩色 PlayStation 徽标的屏幕。我多么希望我那破烂的控制台能够进入第二个屏幕。我的游戏机的光盘轴在我拥有它的很早的时候就解体了。作为一个八岁的孩子，修理主轴是我一生中最危险的任务。互联网还不是真正的操作指南的天堂，所以我用强力胶粘住了那个东西，而且它在某种程度上起作用了。但主轴应该是灵活的，可以让圆盘打开和关闭（它还有一个橡胶圈，里面也有小滚珠轴承——当时的机制让我大吃一惊）。所以，碎片经常脱落，我就把它们粘回去并继续玩游戏。 [图片：“电源”按钮有点弯曲，但像这样的小外观问题从远处很难注意到。 https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/poweron2.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] 等待启动铃声的第二部分在我的控制台上激活是痛苦的。有时需要近 10 秒的时间，或者根本不会发生。好处是，我的游戏时间更加宝贵，这让 Hallmark 的新控制台纪念品装饰品比我预期的更受打击。该公司的运行系列主机复刻版非常棒，其上一款是去年的 Xbox 360 复刻版。很高兴看到一款为具有更大遗产的游戏机制作的游戏（没有受到广泛的硬件问题的影响）。 PlayStation 改变了我与游戏的关系，以及我与科技的关系。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
